name: analysis-report-workflow
description: Machine-readable analysis report workflow definition — quality assessment, component inventory, SEO coverage, normalization metrics, and final report generation.

extractionResults.description: Results from the extraction and analysis pipeline

steps.name: Assess Extraction Quality
steps.description: Evaluate extraction completeness — check for missing images, SEO, schema, specs, duplicates, broken media

steps.name: Calculate Quality Score
steps.description: Calculate weighted quality score from completeness checks — dom, assets, seo, schema, faq, specs

steps.name: Generate Component Report
steps.description: Generate component inventory — identified components, confidence scores, placement suggestions

steps.name: Generate SEO Report
steps.description: Generate SEO coverage report — meta titles, descriptions, OG tags, schema, breadcrumbs coverage percentages

steps.name: Generate Normalization Report
steps.description: Generate normalization metrics — HTML cleaned, CSS extracted, media normalized, URLs resolved

steps.name: Compile Final Report
steps.description: Compile all sub-reports into a single analysis report with summary, scores, and recommendations

steps.name: Return Report to Layer 3
steps.description: Return the final analysis report to Layer 3 for storage and dashboard display
